g.title: Jakub
g.text: that makes the world a better place.

g.title: Shared
g.text: Shared traits of Centralized & Decentralized worlds
◦ Tx = container of asset transfers between accounts
of the Tx Log for better insights

g.title: CentralBanking
g.text: • 3 decades of regulation, fixed rates worldwide
• 1970s: Nixon shock, floating rates, end of gold standard
• tx volume growing exponentially since Web 2.0

g.title: AssetCustody
g.text: • Robust multi-client wallet backed by DB

g.title: CEFI
g.text: SWIFT — connecting the global financial community

g.title: ModernCore
g.text: Modern Centralized Core Architecture in Scala
• Each actor sources its own transactions
◦ Projections are part of the design

g.title: CQRS
g.text: • Ideal use-case for a distributed Actor System

g.title: CentralProblems
g.text: ◦ Visa Tx finality up to 3 days · ~2% fee
◦ new parties / banks cannot easily join
◦ rely on database ACID + thorough tests

g.title: UnbalancedCluster
g.text: • Nodes carry different concentrations of whales & sharks

g.title: DecentralCore
g.text: network & stateless nodes — ideal for ZIO
and consistent across the whole p2p network

g.title: DApps
g.text: Smart-contracts as building blocks of finance

g.title: Relay
g.text: How sustainability is achieved — through further decentralisation.

g.title: Explorer
g.text: • Indexes chain data, exposes HTTP API / GraphQL
• Hard to incentivise people to run it
• Inversion of control — index what you need

g.title: ChainStandards
g.text: Global, open set of standards — reminds of democracy.
